evidence_snippet: Walder has groomed Stevron for lordship of House Frey
House Frey allies with Robb Stark, and Stevron commands the Frey contingent who heads west of the Green Fork with Robb
He is wounded at the Battle of Oxcross. The wound is not thought serious, but three days later Stevron is found dead
At Riverrun after the Battle of the Camps, a cautious Stevron suggests that the north and the riverlands should let Lord Tywin Lannister and Lord Renly Baratheon weaken themselves
Stevron commands the Frey contingent who heads west of the Green Fork with Robb
